original_text:
### Campaign Headline ("YOU DESERVE MORE")
- Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
- **ALL CAPS, always.**
- The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
- Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
- Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
- Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

relations.note: The email-specific Nunito Sans ExtraBold fallback supersedes the standard Agenda treatment.
The hero stacking and alignment apply alongside the campaign-headline typography.
Approved colorways apply to the same campaign headline treatment.
The verbatim full-lockup copy uses the campaign headline treatment.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).

rules.intent: Preserve the distinctive campaign-headline typographic lockup.
rules.rule_text: Set the campaign headline in Agenda, use ALL CAPS, and tint the D in DESERVE and M in MORE to approximately 40% of the headline color. Digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).

rules.intent: Provide the specified email-safe treatment for the campaign headline.
rules.rule_text: In email, use the campaign-headline fallback of Nunito Sans ExtraBold instead of Agenda.

quotes: The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Maintain the approved campaign color treatment and dermatomyositis letter cue.
rules.rule_text: Use only the two approved campaign-headline colorways: Gold/Sunshine (#ffc60a/#faa31b) or Brand Blue (#00529b). In either colorway, the tinted D and M use 40% of that same hue.

quotes: Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved hero lockup composition.
rules.rule_text: In hero placements, stack the campaign headline as three lines—YOU / DESERVE / MORE—and left-align it.
